north_star: Build a Maven/Grace platform that surprises and delights Ruby Red from the very first moment — frictionless, no forms, no barriers, a Trojan horse entry point that earns her trust before she knows what it is. From that first delight, the platform immediately begins improving her financial situation. The 90-day KPI is a 100% lift in her net financial position — measured not just in dollars saved but in every dimension: subscriptions cancelled, NSF fees avoided, barter value gained, neighbor economy value gained, Wisdom Giants coaching value gained, expenses reduced. Every feature has its own financial impact assessment. If we hit 50% of that KPI in 90 days, that is extraordinary. The score is always: how much did Ruby Red's real financial life improve?
target_user: Ruby Red — 35-45 year old working poor mom of two, household CFO, unbanked or underbanked, financially stressed but resourceful

layer_1_trojan_horse_entry.description: Zero-friction entry points that surprise and delight Ruby Red before she knows what Maven is

features.name: Song Studio Ruby Anthem
features.description: AI-powered song creation tool where Ruby Red creates a personalized anthem about her life. 3 free songs, then $0.99 CAD each.
features.entry_mechanism: Direct creation or gift dedication link from a friend

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: HIGH — first delight moment that earns trust for financial features
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Song recipients become members through silent invitation mechanic

features.name: Gift Anthem Dedication
features.description: Send a personalized song as a gift to a friend or neighbor via WhatsApp, SMS, or copy link. Creates a dedication landing page.
features.entry_mechanism: Dedication link received via text from a trusted friend

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: VERY HIGH — trust transfers through existing relationship
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Primary growth engine — every song sent is a silent invitation

features.name: Walk in Her Shoes
features.description: Interactive empathy experience that helps users understand the daily financial decisions of a working poor mom

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: MEDIUM — builds emotional connection to Maven mission
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Awareness and empathy driver for community engagement

layer_2_trust_bridge.description: Grace-guided transition from delight to financial engagement using relationship memory and empathy

features.name: Grace AI Concierge
features.description: Persistent AI companion that guides Ruby Red through the platform. 83 knowledge entries, frontline wisdom from 15 CashCo team members.
features.bridge_mechanism: Grace bridges from delight moment to financial conversation using gift framing — not a sales pitch but a discovery

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: CRITICAL — Grace is the relationship layer that makes everything else work
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Grace is the bridge from every entry point to every financial feature

features.name: Grace Relationship Memory
features.description: Big Mama memory architecture with 5 tables: person_profiles, family_connections, person_notes, person_followups, person_interactions. Currently all empty (0 records).
features.bridge_mechanism: Remembers Ruby Red's name, children, challenges, and personal details to create the Big Mama effect

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: CRITICAL — the difference between a chatbot and a trusted friend
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Retention multiplier — members who feel remembered stay 3x longer

features.name: Scam Alerts
features.description: Community-sourced scam warnings and safety alerts relevant to Ruby Red's area
features.bridge_mechanism: Demonstrates Maven is protecting Ruby Red — builds trust through vigilance

financial_impact_assessment.trust_building_value: HIGH — Maven is watching out for her
financial_impact_assessment.conversion_potential: Trust builder that leads to deeper financial engagement

layer_3_financial_impact_engine.description: Features that directly improve Ruby Red's financial position, each with measurable impact

features.name: Vampire Slayer (Subscription Audit)
features.description: Scans connected accounts, identifies forgotten or unused subscriptions, surfaces one-tap cancellation options

financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Count and dollar value of subscriptions cancelled

features.name: Budget Builder
features.description: Interactive budget planning tool that helps Ruby Red track income vs expenses

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: $50-200/month from identified overspending and budget optimization
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Week 1 — foundation for all other financial features
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Budget completion rate and identified savings opportunities

features.name: Fee Fighter
features.description: Identifies hidden fees and helps Ruby Red fight unfair charges

financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Week 2 — requires some account information from Budget Builder
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Count and dollar value of fees identified and successfully contested

features.name: Bill Tracker
features.description: Track and manage recurring bills to prevent missed payments and NSF fees

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: $35-50 per NSF fee avoided, average 3-5 per year = $105-250/year
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Week 2 — prevents the next NSF fee
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: NSF fees avoided (tracked by bill payment timeliness)

features.name: Debt Snowball Agent
features.description: Generates custom sequenced PDF battle plan for debt elimination using snowball or avalanche method, calibrated to Ruby Red's exact debt load and income

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: Variable — average debt reduction of $2000-5000 in first year through optimized payment sequencing
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Month 1 — requires budget data to generate plan
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Total debt reduced and interest saved vs no-plan baseline

features.name: Savings Goals
features.description: Set and track savings targets with progress visualization

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: $20-100/month in new savings from goal-directed behavior
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Month 1 — builds on Budget Builder foundation
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Savings goal progress and total dollars saved

features.name: Dignity Score
features.description: Proprietary scoring system replacing traditional credit check. Formula: Payment Reliability 40%, Budgeting Engagement 20%, Community Participation 15%, Savings Circle 15%, Referrals 10%.

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: Enables access to Corner Banker services (Milk Money, Chaos Support) — value of $100-750 in emergency funds
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Month 2 — requires 60 days of platform engagement data
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Dignity Score value and services unlocked

features.name: Milk Money Emergency Fund
features.description: Up to $100 emergency cash for paid members. Request submitted and reviewed by admin.

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: Up to $100 per request — prevents cascading financial crisis from small emergencies
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Day 1 for paid members — immediate safety net
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Requests submitted, approved, and crisis events prevented

features.name: Chaos Support
features.description: Up to $250 (Essentials) or $750 (Plus) for unexpected expenses after 60 days of membership

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: Up to $250-750 per request — prevents major financial crisis
financial_impact_assessment.time_to_impact: Month 2+ — requires 60 days of active membership
financial_impact_assessment.measurement: Requests submitted, approved, and crisis severity mitigated

layer_4_community_value.description: Features that create non-dollar economic value through community connection and mutual aid

features.name: Village Hands Help Board
features.description: Community members post requests for help (rides, babysitting, etc.) and others volunteer

features.name: Good Neighbor Barter System
features.description: AI-powered barter matchmaker within 3-mile radius. Concentric circles trust model.

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: $200-500/month equivalent in barter value (requires 15+ active members in radius)

features.name: Wisdom Giants
features.description: Subject matter expert coaching and guidance from community wisdom giants

features.name: Village Chat
features.description: Community chat for Maven members to connect, share, and support each other

financial_impact_assessment.direct_dollar_value: Indirect — social support reduces financial isolation and improves decision-making

features.name: HandUps Daily Grocery Boxes
features.description: Two members selected daily to receive a grocery box delivered to their door

features.name: Make a Wish Daily Draw
features.description: Daily draw with 1 entry (Essentials) or 2 entries (Plus) per member

tiers.name: Observer
tiers.includes: Grace chat, community features, free tools (Budget Builder, Bill Tracker, Savings Goals, Fee Fighter)

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.includes: Milk Money up to $100, Chaos Support up to $250 after 60 days, 1 Make a Wish entry, 1 daily HandUp, Maven Box

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.includes: Everything in Essentials plus Chaos Support up to $750, 2x Make a Wish entries, 2 daily HandUps, Plus-Only perks, priority access
